name: Path Traversal: '...' (Triple Dot)
description: The product does not properly neutralize '...' (triple dot) sequences in user-supplied pathnames, which on some operating systems resolve similarly to '..' and allow traversal outside restricted directories.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides path data containing '...' (triple dot) sequences that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node that canonicalizes the path and validates directory containment after resolving OS-specific dot sequence behaviors
